title: Basic JavaScript File API
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript File API. Focus on implementing File object and FileList correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript File API
description: Create a function that uses File object and FileList and FileReader methods (readAsText, readAsDataURL) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript File API Project
description: Build a small application that applies File object and FileList, FileReader methods (readAsText, readAsDataURL), Drag and drop file handling in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript File API
description: The following code has bugs related to File object and FileList. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript File API
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with File object and FileList and FileReader methods (readAsText, readAsDataURL).
